subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath desired the Face, and teach him My straight Path which hath appeared through My Name amidst the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اراد الوجه و نعرفه سبیلی المستقیم الذی ظهر باسمی بین العالم یشهد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
